# Clipman
> Wayland-native clipboard history manager for Linux. Press Super+V to search, pin and paste from a local SQLite-backed history. No telemetry; sensitive data auto-clears.

- [Project page](https://mohammedel-sayedahmed.github.io/clipman/)
- [Source](https://github.com/MohammedEl-sayedAhmed/clipman)
- [Design workspace](https://mohammedel-sayedahmed.github.io/clipman/design/index.html)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/MohammedEl-sayedAhmed/clipman/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Features

- Wayland-native: GNOME Shell extension over D-Bus, wl-clipboard fallback for KDE/Sway/Hyprland
- Privacy: incognito mode, sensitive-data auto-clear, restrictive file permissions
- Search + pinning + reusable snippets with template variables ({{date}}, {{clipboard}})
- Open source, Apache-2.0, distributed on Snap Store / PyPI / AUR / .deb / .rpm

## Distribution

- Snap: `sudo snap install clipman`
- PyPI: `pipx install clipman-clipboard`
- AUR: `yay -S clipman-clipboard`
